text: وَ الَّذِينَ‌ کَفَرُوا وَ کَذَّبُوا بِآيَاتِنَا أُولٰئِکَ‌ أَصْحَابُ‌ الْجَحِيمِ‌

en.ahmedali: But those who disbelieve and deny Our revelations are the people of Hell.
en.ahmedraza: And those who disbelieve and deny Our signs – it is they who are the people of hell.
en.arberry: And the unbelievers, who cried lies to Our signs -- they shall be the inhabitants of Hell.
en.daryabadi: And those who disbelieve and belie Our signs, they shall be the fellows of the Flaming Fire.
en.hilali: They who disbelieve and deny our Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) are those who will be the dwellers of the Hell-fire.
en.itani: As for those who disbelieve and reject Our revelations—these are the inmates of Hell.
en.maududi: As for those who disbelieve and give the lie to Our signs, they are destined for the Blazing Flame.
en.mubarakpuri: And they who disbelieve and deny Our Ayat are those who will be the dwellers of the Hell-fire.
en.pickthall: And they who disbelieve and deny Our revelations, such are rightful owners of hell.
en.qarai: As for those who are faithless and deny Our signs, they shall be the inmates of hell.
en.qaribullah: As for those who disbelieve and belie Our verses, they shall become the companions of Hell.
en.sahih: But those who disbelieve and deny Our signs - those are the companions of Hellfire.
en.sarwar: However, the unbelievers who have called Our revelations lies will have hell for their dwelling.
en.shakir: And (as for) those who disbelieve and reject our communications, these are the companions of the name.
en.transliteration: Waallatheena kafaroo wakaththaboo biayatina olaika ashabu aljaheemi
en.wahiduddin: but those who deny the truth and deny Our signs are destined for Hell.
en.yusufali: Those who reject faith and deny our signs will be companions of Hell-fire.
fa.ansarian: وکسانی که کافر شدند و آیات ما را تکذیب کردند، اهل دوزخ اند.
fa.ayati: و آنان كه كافر شده‌اند و آيات ما را تكذيب كرده‌اند اهل جهنمند.
fa.bahrampour: و كسانى كه كافر شدند و آيات ما را تكذيب نمودند، آنها اهل دوزخند
fa.fooladvand: و كسانى كه كفر ورزيدند و آيات ما را دروغ انگاشتند، آنان اهل دوزخند.
fa.ghomshei: و آنان که کافر شدند و آیات ما را تکذیب کردند اهل جهنم خواهند بود.
fa.khorramdel: و کسانی که کافر شوند و آیات (قرآنی و جهانی) ما را تکذیب کنند، آنان اهل دوزخ هستند. [[«الْجَحِیمِ»: آتش فروزان. اسمی از اسماء دوزخ است.]]
fa.khorramshahi: و کسانی که کفرورزیده و آیات ما را دروغ انگاشته‌اند، دوزخی‌اند
fa.makarem: و کسانی که کافر شدند و آیات ما را تکذیب کردند، اهل دوزخند.
fa.moezzi: و آنان که کفر ورزیدند و دروغ پنداشتند آیتهای ما را آنانند یاران دوزخ‌
fa.mojtabavi: و كسانى كه كافر شدند و آيات- نشانه‌هاى- ما را دروغ شمردند آنان دوزخيانند.
fa.sadeqi: و کسانی که کافر شدند و با آیات ما (همان‌ها و ما را) دروغ انگاشتند، اینان دوزخیانند.
